name: product-landing
description: Reference landing page recipe for the authenticated product-selection view, aligned with the current MarketState portal login and hub styling.
guidance: Carry over the same visual language as the login page: dark surfaces, soft borders, centered container, and a restrained image shell.
On desktop, present the product selection as a framed card over a full-width background image.
On mobile, allow the shell image to fill the viewport and let the landing card breathe without excessive framing.
Keep product choices visually equal unless one product is intentionally featured.
responsive_rules: Desktop: centered landing card with multi-column product grid.
Tablet: reduce to two columns while preserving card rhythm and padding.
Mobile: single-column cards, simplified spacing, and edge-to-edge background treatment.
